title: Weird Wonderful Wildlife
description:
Weird Wonderful Wildlife (WWW)

A reboot of the Weird and Wonderful Wildlife mod, adding some awesome animals including Dingoes, Australian wetlands birds like the Brolga, and plants later.
body:
![A brolga in a grasslands environment.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76260c08353c3997091ca598d7d78d95f75a6957.png)

Weird Wonderful Wildlife (WWW) - Remake of my 1.16.5 mod of the same name.

A simple mod, adding a plethora of awesome animals including Dingoes, Australian wetlands birds like the Brolga, and plants later. All entities have a unique set of realistic animations including foraging, diving, and swimming. These entities also spawn naturally in different biomes in survival mode, and are awesome additions to zoos and wildlife parks in creative mode!

Trek through the jungles through to the dark forests, Weird Wonderful Wildlife has it all.
